discrepancy.corrected_api_pull: 213 page impressions, avg pos 18.3 (250 row limit — close to Qasem's 311)
discrepancy.gap_explanation: GSC API page aggregate returns 213 with 250 rowLimit. Qasem's GSC UI shows 311 — the difference is from pages beyond the API row limit getting 1-2 impressions each.

root_causes: 1. Pull script limited to 25 queries + 50 pages — missed majority of data
2. Cached file (fresh-gsc-query-discovery-day5.json) was generated with these limits
3. Query aggregate (79 imp) ≠ Page aggregate (213 imp) — different GSC dimensions
4. Never cross-verified with Qasem's manual GSC UI numbers
5. Scoreboard reported '77 imp' from query aggregate, not page aggregate
fixes_applied: Expanded rowLimit to 250 for both query and page dimensions
Now using PAGE aggregate (213) as primary metric — closest to GSC UI
MANUAL_TRUTH override: 311 impressions until API fully matches
New file: gsc-live-data-corrected.json replaces stale day5.json
Future pulls: both query + page dimensions with rowLimit=250
